response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive senior-level engineering experience, including a strong background in geospatial data platforms (GISCollective, Green Map) and high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems. While his domain knowledge in GIS and systems architecture is highly relevant, his recent programming experience heavily favors TypeScript and DLang rather than the required modern C++ or Rust. He is worth interviewing for his domain expertise and engineering fundamentals, provided the team is willing to allow ramp-up time for the specific tech stack.
strengths: Extensive domain experience designing and operating geospatial data platforms and GIS applications.
Proven track record building high-throughput, low-latency microservices and distributed systems.
Strong engineering practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and a demonstrated willingness to learn new technologies.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, which are primary requirements for the role.
Previous C/C++ experience is nearly a decade old and focused on IDE components rather than data pipelines.
No direct mention of routing-specific algorithms, tiling optimization, or real-time traffic signal integration.
